_instructions.weight: How much this field contributes to the total score (0–100). All weights are relative — they don't need to sum to 100.

condition_type.less_than: Numeric — scores if field value <  threshold
condition_type.greater_than: Numeric — scores if field value >  threshold
condition_type.between: Numeric — scores if min <= field value <= max. Use 'value': [min, max]
condition_type.in_list: Field value must be one of the listed options
condition_type.compatible_with: Field value must appear in one of the same compatibility groups

_instructions.partial_credit: Optional (default false). If true, numeric conditions give scaled 0–1 credit instead of all-or-nothing.
_instructions.note: Field names must exactly match the column headers in your Google Sheet (case-sensitive).
